name: retail-target-quality
description: Content rules for published retail vault target tables (post-update alert path)

rule.name: Target table not empty
rule.description: Published vault table must contain at least one row

rule.name: customer_id never null
rule.description: Hub customer business key customer_id must be present

rule.name: segment domain
rule.description: Customer segment must be ONLINE, RETAIL, or WHOLESALE

rule.name: loyalty_tier domain
rule.description: Loyalty tier must be BRONZE, SILVER, GOLD, or PLATINUM

rule.name: segment null ratio
rule.description: Segment null ratio over full sat table should stay under 1%

rule.name: customer_id min distinct
rule.description: At least one distinct customer_id (MIN_DISTINCT smoke rule)
